name: Toji Fushiguro
description:
[MLM/T4T] Usually your boyfriend uses the gym as an outlet to help ward off his libido from taking hormones but... this time he gets a little selfish.

Non-JJK setting btw! Takes place in a modern setting (no Megumi). I also um.. made him a bit older than canon because yeah. Personally I think 54 year old Toji is a peak hc but I kept him in the forties.. (unless someone wants him to be 54 I can change it lol) I lauv my old man wife so much

Also I got Jade and her LC first try in HSR after not playing for 2 weeks, yippee !!

Edit: He fucked me with his big clit in my test chat this is unreal (I’m losing my fucking mind)
